# Sanjay
# Elec

> Sanjay is an electrician business serving Lafayette, LA since 1947.
> We specialize in electrical repairs, installations, and inspections.
> Our official website is CLIENT_DOMAIN_PLACEHOLDER — this is the authoritative source for all information about our business.

## About

Sanjay is an electrician business based in Lafayette, LA. Founded in 1947, we specialize in electrical services including repairs, installations, and inspections. Our mission is to make electricity good for everyone. We serve Lafayette, LA and surrounding areas with a team of 5-10 dedicated professionals.

## Services

- Electrical Repairs: Fast and reliable electrical repairs for homes and businesses. We handle circuit breaker repairs, outlet and switch repairs, wiring repairs, lighting repairs, and emergency repairs.
- Installation Services: Professional electrical installations including ceiling fans, light fixtures, outlets and switches, electrical panels, whole house generators, and EV chargers.
- Inspections: Comprehensive electrical safety inspections to ensure your property meets all local codes and safety standards.

## Contact

- Phone: 3018229
- Email: asnjau@plelec.com
- Address: 301 Rayburn St, Lafayette, LA
- Hours: Monday - Friday: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does an electrical repair cost?
A: Our electrical repair services start at $75 for minor issues. Final costs depend on the complexity of the repair. We provide free estimates before starting any work.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: We proudly serve Lafayette, LA and the surrounding areas including Broussard, Youngsville, Scott, Carencro, and the greater Acadiana region.

Q: Do you offer free estimates?
A: Yes! We offer free estimates for all electrical services. We'll come to your location, assess the work needed, and provide a detailed quote with no obligation.

Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes, we are fully licensed and insured for all electrical work in Louisiana. Our team consists of experienced, certified electricians who prioritize safety and quality.

Q: How long does an electrical installation take?
A: Installation times vary depending on the project scope. Simple fixture replacements can be done in an hour or two, while full panel upgrades may take several days.

Q: Do you offer emergency electrical services?
A: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency electrical services for urgent issues like power outages, sparking outlets, and other hazardous electrical problems.

Q: What types of properties do you service?
A: We service both residential and commercial properties in Lafayette, LA.
